source: LXCat, www.lxcat.net (SIGLO & Morgan databases); GitHub mirror lindsayad/pythonForBolos/LXCat-June2013.txt

databases.name: Morgan database (LXCat 2013)
databases.description: Electron-collision cross sections assembled by W.L. Morgan (Kinema Research & Software). F2 set: W.L. Morgan, Plasma Chem. Plasma Process. 12, 449 (1992). Distributed on LXCat (GREPHE 2013 export).
databases.contact: W. Lowell Morgan, Kinema Research & Software
databases.how_to_reference: Morgan database, www.lxcat.net; W.L. Morgan, Plasma Chem. Plasma Process. 12, 449 (1992).

databases.name: SIGLO database (LXCat)
databases.description: Boltzmann-solver cross-section sets (Kinema/SIGLO series). Krypton cross sections digitized from H. Date, Y. Sakai & H. Tagashira, J. Phys. D 22, 1478 (1989). Distributed on LXCat.
databases.how_to_reference: SIGLO database, www.lxcat.net; H. Date, Y. Sakai, H. Tagashira, J. Phys. D 22, 1478 (1989).

processes.label: SIGLO · Kr · E + Kr -> E + Kr (elastic momentum transfer)
processes.reaction: E + Kr -> E + Kr (elastic momentum transfer)
processes.comment: elastic MOMENTUM-TRANSFER CROSS SECTION Krypton set distributed via the SIGLO database on LXCat, digitized from H. Date, Y. Sakai & H. Tagashira, J. Phys. D 22, 1478 (1989) (Nov 2012). Cross section already in m^2. Retrieved from the GREPHE/LAPLACE LXCat export 'LXCat-June2013.txt' (downloaded 4 Jun 2013), public GitHub mirror lindsayad/pythonForBolos. Re-pull from lxcat.net for canonical provenance. Digitized curve; (E,sigma) pairs sorted by energy.

processes.label: Morgan · F2 · E + F2 -> F^-+F
processes.comment: F^-+F,(diss. att.) Fluorine-molecule (F2) set from the Morgan database on LXCat; W.L. Morgan, Plasma Chem. Plasma Process. 12, 449 (1992). Cross section already in m^2. Retrieved from the GREPHE/LAPLACE LXCat export 'LXCat-June2013.txt' (4 Jun 2013), GitHub mirror lindsayad/pythonForBolos. CAVEAT: the zero-energy dissociative-attachment value (8e-19 m^2) is very large; verify the low-energy magnitude against a primary source (Chantry; Christophorou) before quantitative use.

processes.label: Morgan · F2 · E + F2 -> E + F2 (effective)
processes.comment: Total momentum transfer Morgan Qm + att at low energy. Extrapolation > 20 eV using ln(e)/e. Needs to be Fluorine-molecule (F2) set from the Morgan database on LXCat; W.L. Morgan, Plasma Chem. Plasma Process. 12, 449 (1992). Cross section already in m^2. Retrieved from the GREPHE/LAPLACE LXCat export 'LXCat-June2013.txt' (4 Jun 2013), GitHub mirror lindsayad/pythonForBolos. Effective (total momentum transfer); includes attachment at low energy and an ln(e)/e extrapolation above 20 eV per the source COMMENT.
